tasks.label: Runner: Bench
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/runner_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 launch runner_bringup bench.launch.py

tasks.label: Runner: SLAM
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/runner_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 launch runner_bringup slam.launch.py

tasks.label: Runner: Teleop
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/runner_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 launch runner_bringup teleop.launch.py

tasks.label: Runner: Battery
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/runner_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 run runner_battery battery_node

tasks.label: Runner: Foxglove
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source ~/runner_ws/install/setup.bash && ros2 launch foxglove_bridge foxglove_bridge_launch.xml

tasks.label: Runner: Stop All
tasks.command: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && pkill -f 'ros2 launch' || true; pkill -f 'ros2 run' || true; pkill -f rf2o || true; pkill -f slam_toolbox || true; pkill -f ldlidar || true; pkill -f foxglove || true; sleep 1 && ros2 daemon stop && ros2 daemon start; ros2 node list
